TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Giannis_Antetokounmpo, title = Giannis_Antetokounmpo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Giannis_Antetokounmpo} }

S.FORM: Giannis Antetokounmpo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy. kawas tay 1994, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 12, Giannis Antetokounmpo, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Giannis Antetokounmpo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy. kawas tay 1994, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 12, Giannis Antetokounmpo, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
